title: [AINews] Context Drought
description: a quiet day lets us reflect on Anthropic's belated GA of 1M context windows after Gemini and OpenAI.

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Saturday, March 14
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 14.

title: How Vessi Sells Waterproof Shoes
description:
Director of ecommerce Ray Hua shares the challenges of targeting the right audience, cross-border selling, diversifying, and more.
The post How Vessi Sells Waterproof Shoes appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: New Balance expands its resale platform with addition of apparel
description:
In 2024, New Balance launched Reconsidered, the brand’s resale program. And in 2026, the company is now building on its success to add apparel to the footwear already sold to the program. According to New Balance, since Reconsidered’s launch, the platform has helped to recirculate more than 100,000 pairs of the brand’s shoes. New Balance […]
The post New Balance expands its resale platform with addition of apparel appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: B2B and B2C companies increase AI investment as agentic commerce gains traction
description:
Artificial intelligence is rapidly becoming a core component of both B2B and B2C enterprise ecommerce operations as companies deploy AI across customer experiences, pricing, inventory management and fulfillment while preparing for the rise of “agentic commerce,” according to new research. Logicbroker commissioned the study, which Midsail Research and On-Call CMO conducted. The companies surveyed 600 ecommerce […]
The post B2B and B2C companies increase AI investment as agentic commerce gains traction appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Stitch Fix revenue rises as CEO credits AI tools in Q2
description:
Stitch Fix Inc. reported its second straight quarter of revenue growth in fiscal Q2 as the company works to stabilize its business after several years of declining sales. Net revenue totaled $341.3 million in the fiscal second quarter ended Jan. 31, up 9.4% from $312.1 million a year earlier. The gains came even as the […]
The post Stitch Fix revenue rises as CEO credits AI tools in Q2 appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: War escalation raises shipping costs and delivery risks for B2B sellers
description:
The escalating war in the Middle East is beginning to disrupt global shipping networks, raising freight costs and delivery logistics uncertainty for U.S. companies that sell through B2B ecommerce channels. Airspace closures, security risks and vessel rerouting tied to the U.S. and Israel’s war on Iran are affecting cargo movement across key trade corridors linking […]
The post War escalation raises shipping costs and delivery risks for B2B sellers appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Adobe CEO decides to transition out of role
description:
The CEO of Adobe has decided to transition from his position once the company appoints a successor, the company announced March 12. Shantanu Narayen has served as the Adobe CEO for 18 years. He will remain chair of the board, according to the company’s announcement. In addition to its popular creative suite that allows photo […]
The post Adobe CEO decides to transition out of role appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Ulta to launch on TikTok Shop with curated assortment
description: The beauty retailer's Q4 net sales grew nearly 12%, though industry analysts questioned the retailer's "softer" fiscal 2026 comp guidance.

title: Dick’s pulls back on Foot Locker closures amid store pilot success
description: A new format is performing so well that Dick’s plans to expand it to 250 Foot Locker stores by this fall — and will shutter a “much smaller” list of locations.

title: The Weekly Closeout: Amazon notches a win against Perplexity, Reebok reenters soccer
description: The e-commerce giant got a temporary order blocking access for Perplexity’s AI shopping agents, while the athletics brand signed two professional soccer players.

title: Sleep Number issues going concern warning, says bankruptcy is possible
description: The mattress maker’s turnaround has been slow, mired in debt and liquidity issues, but is picking up speed under new leadership.

title: CBP is working on 4-step tariff refund process
description: The agency detailed progress it’s made developing a dedicated system to process refunds for International Emergency Economic Powers Act tariffs.

title: Apple drops commission rates in China without a fuss
description: Apple dropped its App Store commission rates to 25% in China, and commissions on auto-renewed subscriptions down to 12%.

title: Why physical AI is becoming manufacturing’s next advantage
description: For decades, manufacturers have pursued automation to drive efficiency, reduce costs, and stabilize operations. That approach delivered meaningful gains, but it is no longer enough. Today’s manufacturing leaders face a different challenge: how to grow amid labor constraints, rising complexity, and increasing pressure to innovate faster without sacrificing safety, quality, or trust. The next phase…
